name: dimly lit Elevator Shaft
description: I'm in a dimly lit Elevator Shaft
hints: Ground level elevator shaft. Check tool niches for hidden items.
LOOK NICHE finds something hidden (drops held item). LOOK SHAFT shows niches.
LOOK NICHE finds items. UP to shaft level 2 (room 9). WEST to waiting room (room 5). Check niches at every level.
notes: Shaft level 1. LOOK NICHE finds items. UP to level 2 (room 9). WEST to waiting room (room 5).
